Home.hero_subtitle: A trusted microfinance institution empowering communities with accessible and reliable financial services.
Home.welcome_title: Welcome To CYC Nepal Laghubitta Bittiya Sanstha Ltd.
Home.welcome_text1: The CYC Nepal Laghubitta Bittiya Sanstha Ltd. is a leading Microfinance in Nepal. It was registered on 11 February 2019 as a public company as a class 'D' financial institution with the Nepal Rastra Bank under Act, 2063 and started formal microfinance operation from 15 March, 2019. CYC Nepal Laghubitta Bittiya Sanstha previously known as CYC (Chartare Youth Club) which is located in Samikshalaya Road Baglung.
Home.welcome_text2: Currently CYC Nepal Laghubitta Bittiya Sanstha is providing microfinance services to more than 59000 deprived household from Hilly and Mountainous regions of Nepal with prime focus on low-income households, assets-less, self-employed in the informal sector to uplift their livelihood increasing involvement in economic activities and income generating activities. Besides all these financial services, it also focuses on their social development, cultural promotion, educational development, skill development & many more by its fully operated 124 branch offices which are located in All over the Nepal.

Home.message_from_ceo: Thank you for your continued hard work, dedication, and unwavering commitment to our shared goals. Every effort you put in, whether big or small, plays a vital role in shaping our success as a team and as an organization. Your professionalism, consistency, and willingness to go the extra mile do not go unnoticed. It is your collective effort that drives our progress, strengthens our foundation, and helps us move forward even in challenging times. We deeply value the time, energy, and passion you bring to your work each day.As we continue to grow, I want to encourage each of you to keep striving for excellence, to keep learning, and to keep pushing boundaries. Let us continue supporting one another, collaborating effectively, and maintaining the high standards that define who we are.Together, we are building something meaningful and lasting. I am truly grateful to have such a committed and talented team, and I look forward to what we will achieve together in the days ahead.
